summary: Comprehensive testing of the custom sections product experience overhaul. All backend APIs (10/10) and all frontend UI flows verified. Custom sections feature, tabbed admin form, read-only intake keys, OfferingCard enhancements, and product detail page rendering all working correctly.

design_issues.screen: Product Detail Page - custom section content
issues: Section content is rendered using whitespace-pre-wrap (plain text) NOT parsed markdown HTML. Content '- Feature A\n- Feature B' shows as literal dashes, not HTML bullets. Admin form label says 'Markdown supported' but rendering does not parse markdown. Consider adding a markdown renderer (e.g., react-markdown) if proper markdown rendering is desired. Currently works as plain preformatted text.

critical_code_review_comments: Section content uses `whitespace-pre-wrap` for rendering markdown in ProductDetail.tsx (line 509). If proper markdown rendering is needed, use react-markdown or similar library. Currently only whitespace/newlines are preserved.
SectionsEditor useState starts with section 0 expanded by default (expandedIdx=0). This is correct behavior but may need documentation.
AdminProductUpdate model has `pricing_complexity: Optional[str] = None` but ProductsTab handleSave doesn't include it - this is fine as it defaults to None and only updates if present.
The `_id` MongoDB field is properly excluded in all endpoints via `{'_id': 0}` projection - no serialization issues.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed products (deactivated after tests). A product 'TEST_UI_Custom_Sections_Product' was created via UI test (inactive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All custom sections features verified and working: (1) Admin product form has 4 tabs: General/Pricing/Intake Questions/Page Content. (2) SectionsEditor in Page Content tab: default Overview section, add/remove/reorder up to 10 sections, icon/icon_color/tags/content per section. (3) IntakeSchemaBuilder: key is read-only div (auto-generated from label), option 'value' input removed (auto-generated from label). (4) OfferingCard shows product.tag (custom field), short_description, ALL bullets. (5) ProductDetail renders custom_sections with icon+color+content+tags, falls back to static sections when empty. (6) Backend auto-creates default 'Overview' section when none provided. Test product IDs: Test Custom Sections Product: 1d8c7a75-a957-435d-92d3-c0809a94b36d (active, Bookkeeping). Section content uses whitespace-pre-wrap (not markdown parsed).
